title: Cathleen Hunter
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Cathleen Hunter''' is an artist who provided illustrations for many of the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' sourcebooks.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Sources==
*''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Three]]'' (''Riders of the Maelstrom'')
*''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Three]]'' (''Death in the Undercity'')
*''[[Classic Campaigns]]''
*[[Cracken's Rebel Field Guide (sourcebook)|''Cracken's Rebel Field Guide'']]
*''[[Mission to Lianna]]''
*''[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook]]''
*[[The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook (Second Edition)|''The Rebel Alliance Sourcebook'', Second Edition]]
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (West End Games)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']]
*''[[Death in the Undercity]]''
*''[[Scavenger Hunt]]''
*[[Twin Stars of Kira (West End Games)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]
